items.name: Toxic Goo Trap
items.description: Encase your enemies in toxic goo for fun and profit!  Okay maybe just fun.

items.name: XLS Mark II Pulse Laser Pistol
items.description: The XLS Mark II Pulse Laser Pistol is standard issue in the intergalactic police corps.

items.name: Lightning Wand
items.description: You control the weather now. Science!  Click your Lightning Rod to fire bolts of lightning in any direction you like.

items.name: Polar Mount
items.description: Ride your very own furry, friendly, polar bear! Use 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or the arrow keys to control and hit space to jump. Use the control key to dismount.

items.name: Giant Kaiju Arms
items.description: Equip this gear to get monster-like arms. Clicking makes you punch, so you're ready for any fight.

items.name: Pot O’ Gold Sword
items.description: Defend your treasure with this mighty sword, leaving a rainbow trail in your wake.

items.name: Tiger Skin
items.description: When you are wearing this - you become stronger and faster.  Enemies will fear your touch as a single strike while wearing the skin will disarm them...literally.

items.name: Roman Catapult
items.description: Equip this catapult and click to spawn a giant catapult in front of you.  Click again to add a flaming brick to the catapult and watch it launch in any direction you point your mouse!  As it travels through the air it increases in size and will do 35 points of damage to anyone it hits.

items.name: Inflatable Saxophone
items.description: Play some airy tunes with this sax.

items.name: Earth Summoning Horn
items.description: Blow upon this mighty relic to summon a massive earthquake within a 30 stud radius of where you're standing. Unanchored bricks begin to shake and break apart, and players trip and fall to the ground, slowly losing health. Three shockwaves are sent out, dealing around 20 damage per hit.

items.name: Shadow Sword
items.description: Equipping the Shadow Sword shrouds your character in darkness. You immediately transform into a warrior wearing a jet-black suit and begin emitting a cloud of dark fog. While your appearance unnerves and disorients your opponents, each sword strike does 35 points of damage and pressing space twice teleports you forward.

items.name: Pirate Throwing Axes
items.description: Yer foes don't stand a chance when you got yer trusty pirate axes.  Click to throw two hatchets at your foes. Each hatchet does 28 damage. If you're really lucky and both hit, that's a combined 56 total damage!

items.name: Breath of Fire
items.description: Swallow the flames and spit out fireballs at your foes!

items.name: ROBLOX U Free Stuff Launcher
items.description: Stuff! People love stuff!  Launch free pizza and tee shirts from this cannon.

items.name: Bongos
items.description: Dance to the rhythm of the beat!

items.name: Killer Whale Launcher
items.description: These whales nuke you!  Shoot whales at your foes to do 10 damage per touch- ie instant KO.  To zoom, you roll your mouse wheel and use either 'Q' or 'Z'.

items.name: Remote Controlled Monster Truck
items.description: The latest in the series, the powerful Monster Truck! Control the truck with the regular movement keys and watch as it breaks top speeds across the board. With enough strength to move objects, at full speed, this Truck is a beast!

items.name: Golden Shuriken
items.description: As graceful as the falling leaves, as fast as the hunted gazelle.

items.name: Watermelon Launcher
items.description: Click to launch ripe summer watermelons at your foes!  If hit, your target will take 15 damage and have a screen covered in Watermelon splatters!
